source_metadata.title: 2025/12/03 - EW (Part 3)
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 3 December 2025 | Education and Workforce Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Ministry of Education

Hearing of evidence:

Ministry of Education

Ellen MacGregor-Reid, Te Tumu Whakarae mō te Mātauranga | Secretary for Education
Pauline Cleaver, Hautū, Te Poutāhū | Deputy Secretary - Curriculum Centre
Kevin Martin, Chief Financial Officer
Rob Campbell, Hautū, Te Pou Rangatōpū | Deputy Secretary – Corporate
Andy Jackson, Hautū, Te Pou Kaupapahere | Deputy Secretary – Policy
Mere-Hēni Simcock-Rēweti, Hautū, Te Pou Tuarongo | Deputy Secretary - Te Pou Tuarongo
Helen Hurst, Acting Hautū, Te Pae Aronui | Acting Deputy Secretary – Operations and Integration
Anna Welanyk, Hautū, Te Pou Ohumahi Mātauranga | Deputy Secretary - Education Workforce
